cookies.name: _ga
cookies.description: Google Analytics Cookie that helps us count how many people visit our website by tracking if you’ve visited before.

cookies.name: _gid
cookies.description: Legacy Universal Analytics cookie used to distinguish users. Stores and updates a unique value for each page visited. Universal Analytics was sunset on July 1, 2024; this cookie will no longer be set by new GA implementations but may persist on sites still loading the legacy analytics.js library.

cookies.name: _gat
cookies.description: Legacy Universal Analytics cookie used to throttle request rate, limiting data collection on high traffic sites. Universal Analytics was sunset on July 1, 2024; this cookie will no longer be set by new GA implementations but may persist on sites still loading the legacy analytics.js library.

cookies.name: _ga_{MEASUREMENT_ID}
cookies.description: Used by Google Analytics to find and track an individual session with your device.

cookies.name: _gcl_au
cookies.description: Set by the Conversion Linker (gtm.js) for Google Ads conversion tracking. Stores a first-party identifier so conversions can be attributed to ad clicks across sessions and devices. Required for accurate Google Ads conversion measurement; can be customized or disabled via Conversion Linker tag settings.

cookies.name: _gcl_aw
cookies.description: Stores Google Ads click data for conversion attribution.

cookies.name: _fbp
cookies.description: Identifies browsers for delivering advertising and site analytics services. Used by Facebook to deliver targeted advertisements.

cookies.name: fr
cookies.description: Facilitates ad delivery and retargeting. Contains browser and user unique ID combo for targeted advertising.

cookies.name: _fbc
cookies.description: Stores last Facebook click identifier. Used to attribute conversions to Facebook ads.

cookies.name: NID
cookies.description: Contains a unique ID used to remember preferences and other information such as preferred language, search results per page, and SafeSearch settings. Also used to customize ads.

cookies.name: CONSENT
cookies.description: Stores the status of user's consent to the use of various Google services. Also serves security purposes like verifying users and preventing credential fraud.

cookies.name: __hstc
cookies.description: Hubspot set this main cookie for tracking visitors. It contains the domain, initial timestamp (first visit), last timestamp (last visit), current timestamp (this visit), and session number (increments for each subsequent session).

cookies.name: hubspotutk
cookies.description: HubSpot sets this cookie to keep track of the visitors to the website. This cookie is passed to HubSpot on form submission and used when deduplicating contacts.

cookies.name: __hssc
cookies.description: Session tracking; domain, view count, session start; drives __hstc updates.

cookies.name: __hssrc
cookies.description: Set when session cookie changes; detects browser restart (new session if absent).

cookies.name: _hjid
cookies.description: Set when a user first lands on a page with Hotjar script. Persists the Hotjar User ID unique to that site on the browser.

cookies.name: _hjSessionUser_{site_id}
cookies.description: Set when a user first lands on a page. Persists the Hotjar User ID unique to that site. Ensures data from subsequent visits are attributed to the same user.

cookies.name: _hjSession_{site_id}
cookies.description: Holds current session data. Ensures subsequent requests in the session window are attributed to the same session.

cookies.name: li_gc
cookies.description: Stores visitors' consent regarding the use of cookies for non-essential purposes on LinkedIn.

cookies.name: bcookie
cookies.description: Browser Identifier cookie. Uniquely identifies devices accessing LinkedIn to detect abuse on the platform.

cookies.name: lidc
cookies.description: Facilitates data center selection to optimize LinkedIn performance.

cookies.name: UserMatchHistory
cookies.description: LinkedIn Ads ID syncing for tracking conversions, retargeting, and analytics.

cookies.name: AnalyticsSyncHistory
cookies.description: Stores information about the timing of synchronization with the lms_analytics cookie for users in designated countries. Used to track analytics data sync across LinkedIn domains.

cookies.name: bscookie
cookies.description: Secure browser ID cookie. Used alongside the bcookie to identify the browser and store logged-in user interactions with LinkedIn services for security and preference tracking.

cookies.name: li_sugr
cookies.description: Makes a probabilistic match of a user's identity outside designated countries. Used for ad targeting, retargeting, and campaign analytics.

cookies.name: li_fat_id
cookies.description: First-party ads tracking cookie (LINKEDIN_FIRST_PARTY_ADS_TRACKING_UUID). Set when a user clicks a LinkedIn ad and lands on the advertiser's site. Used for conversion tracking, retargeting, and attribution via the LinkedIn Conversions API.

cookies.name: JSESSIONID
cookies.description: Used to maintain an anonymous user session by the server. Standard Java session identifier.

cookies.name: PHPSESSID
cookies.description: Standard PHP session cookie. Contains a unique session identifier to maintain user state across page requests.

cookies.name: ASP.NET_SessionId
cookies.description: Standard ASP.NET session state cookie. Maintains a unique session identifier for each user.

cookies.name: osano_consentmanager
cookies.description: Stores the user's current consent status.

cookies.name: osano_consentmanager_uuid
cookies.description: Stores the user's unique consent identifier

cookies.name: osano_consentmanager_expdate
cookies.description: DEPRECATED (October 2021) — Stored when the user's consent expires and Osano needs to ask for consent again.

cookies.name: usprivacy
cookies.description: DEPRECATED — IAB US Privacy String framework cookie for Do Not Sell (DNS) signals.

cookies.name: wp-wpml_current_language
cookies.description: Stores the visitor's selected language on WPML-powered multilingual WordPress sites.

cookies.name: lang
cookies.description: Stores the user's preferred language setting to provide localized content.

cookies.name: timezone
cookies.description: Stores the user's timezone preference for displaying time-sensitive content correctly.

cookies.name: IDE
cookies.description: DoubleClick advertising cookie used to register what ads have been displayed to the user, to determine which ad is most relevant. Used for ad delivery, retargeting, and conversion tracking across sites.

cookies.name: DSID
cookies.description: DoubleClick cookie that identifies signed-in users on non-Google sites to respect their ad personalization settings. Short-lived compared to other DoubleClick cookies.

cookies.name: test_cookie
cookies.description: Used by DoubleClick to check if the browser supports cookies before setting ad cookies. Part of standard ad tech; user can enable or disable via consent.

cookies.name: _vwo_uuid_v2
cookies.description: This VWO cookie calculates unique traffic on a website. It's used for A/B testing and experience optimization.

cookies.name: _vwo_uuid
cookies.description: This VWO cookie generates a unique id for every visitor

cookies.name: _vis_opt_s
cookies.description: This VWO cookie tracks session created for a visitor

cookies.name: _vis_opt_test_cookie
cookies.description: This VWO cookie is to read if cookies can be placed.

cookies.name: _vis_opt_exp_{CAMPAIGN}_combi
cookies.description: Ensures visitors see the same variation upon revisiting. Stores the assigned experiment variation. The cookie name includes the campaign identifier.

cookies.name: _vis_opt_exp_{CAMPAIGN}_goal_{GOAL}
cookies.description: Created when a campaign goal is triggered. Tracks goal completions for VWO experiments. The cookie name includes the campaign and goal identifiers.

cookies.name: _vwo_sn
cookies.description: This VWO cookie stores session-level information

cookies.name: _vwo_ds
cookies.description: This VWO cookie stores persistent visitor-level data for VWO Insights.

cookies.name: debug_vwo_uuid
cookies.description: Debug cookie that generates a unique identifier for each visitor. Used for report segmentation and refined data analysis during VWO debugging.

cookies.name: debug_vis_opt_s
cookies.description: Debug cookie that detects whether a visitor is new or returning to a particular test. Used for VWO debugging purposes.

cookies.name: debug_vwo_ds
cookies.description: Debug cookie that stores persistent visitor-level data for VWO Insights. Duration depends on account's retention period.

cookies.name: debug_vwo_sn
cookies.description: Debug cookie that stores session-level information. Duration is 30 minutes and resets on visitor activity. Created while previewing or viewing heatmaps.

cookies.name: _vwo_ssm
cookies.description: This VWO cookie is used for testing and is created only on sites that use the HTTP protocol.

cookies.name: _vwo
cookies.description: This VWO cookie is a jar of all the VWO cookies. It is currently created only for the Safari browser

cookies.name: _vwo_uuid_{CAMPAIGN_ID}
cookies.description: This VWO cookie is created for each cross-domain campaign. The cookie name includes the campaign identifier.

cookies.name: _GRECAPTCHA
cookies.description: Set by Google reCAPTCHA to identify bots and protect the website against malicious spam attacks. Required for form submissions.

cookies.name: rc::a
cookies.description: Used to track and analyze user behavior to distinguish humans from bots. Persistent cookie that does not expire.

cookies.name: rc::b
cookies.description: Session cookie set by reCAPTCHA to identify bots and protect against spam attacks.

cookies.name: rc::c
cookies.description: Session cookie set by reCAPTCHA for bot detection and spam protection.

cookies.name: rc::f
cookies.description: Used by reCAPTCHA to distinguish between humans and bots.

cookies.name: wordpress_logged_in_{hash}
cookies.description: Indicates when a user is logged in and identifies the user for interface interactions. Expires in 48 hours, or 14 days if 'Remember Me' is selected.

cookies.name: wordpress_sec_{hash}
cookies.description: Secure authentication cookie for WordPress. Used alongside wordpress_logged_in for HTTPS connections.

cookies.name: wp-settings-{UID}
cookies.description: Stores user-specific settings and preferences for the WordPress admin interface. The cookie name includes the user identifier.

cookies.name: wp-settings-time-{UID}
cookies.description: Stores the time when wp-settings cookie was set. Used in conjunction with wp-settings for admin preferences. The cookie name includes the user identifier.

cookies.name: wordpress_test_cookie
cookies.description: Tests if cookies are enabled in the browser. Required for WordPress login functionality.

cookies.name: comment_author_{hash}
cookies.description: Stores the comment author's name. Pre-fills the name field when leaving new comments.

cookies.name: comment_author_email_{hash}
cookies.description: Stores the comment author's email. Pre-fills the email field when leaving new comments.

cookies.name: comment_author_url_{hash}
cookies.description: Stores the comment author's website URL. Pre-fills the URL field when leaving new comments.

cookies.name: _vwo_consent
cookies.description: Tracks visitor consent status for VWO compliance.

cookies.name: _vis_opt_out
cookies.description: Excludes visitor from all VWO campaigns.

cookies.name: _vwo_referrer
cookies.description: Stores referral source for Split URL campaigns.

cookies.name: _vis_opt_exp_{CAMPAIGNID}_exclude
cookies.description: Visitor excluded from campaign by traffic %. The cookie name includes the campaign identifier.

cookies.name: _vis_opt_exp_{CAMPAIGNID}_split
cookies.description: Split URL variation verification before redirect. The cookie name includes the campaign identifier.

cookies.name: _vis_opt_exp_{CAMPAIGNID}_combi_choose
cookies.expiry: Persists until campaign changes are applied
cookies.description: Stores referral info allowing VWO to identify the original traffic source for Split URL campaigns. Created only for Split URL campaigns but can be read by all campaign types. The cookie name includes the campaign identifier.

cookies.name: _vwo_global_opt_out
cookies.description: Visitor opted out of VWO on all sites in browser.

cookies.name: wingify_push_subscription_id
cookies.description: Push subscription ID for VWO Engage.

cookies.name: wingify_push_subscription_endpoint
cookies.description: Push subscription endpoint for Engage.

cookies.name: _vwo_uuid_cd
cookies.description: This vwo cookie is created once cross-domain tracking for insights is enabled. This cookie generates a unique id for every visitor.

cookies.name: __cfruid
cookies.description: Cloudflare CDN rate limiting.

cookies.name: __cfuvid
cookies.description: Cloudflare WAF cookie used to distinguish individual users who share the same IP address and apply per-user rate limits. Session-only; does not persist across visits or collect personal data.

cookies.name: __cf_bm
cookies.description: This cookie, set by Cloudflare, is used to support Cloudflare Bot Management.

cookies.name: __hs_opt_out
cookies.description: Remembers visitor opt-out of cookies.

cookies.name: __hs_do_not_track
cookies.description: Prevents tracking code sending data to HubSpot.

cookies.name: __hs_initial_opt_in
cookies.description: Prevents consent banner in strict mode.

cookies.name: __hs_cookie_cat_pref
cookies.description: Stores consented cookie categories.

cookies.name: hs_ab_test
cookies.description: Serves same A/B test variation to visitor.

cookies.name: hs-messages-is-open
cookies.description: Chat widget open/closed state.

cookies.name: hs-messages-hide-welcome-message
cookies.description: Hides chat welcome message after dismiss.

cookies.name: messagesUtk
cookies.description: Chat visitor ID for chatflows and history.

cookies.name: __hsmem
cookies.description: Encrypted membership user ID when logged in.

cookies.name: hs-membership-csrf
cookies.description: CSRF token for membership login.

cookies.name: nlsrid{id}
cookies.description: Pattern discovered by Osano consent/audit tools. Name: 'nlsrid' plus numeric ID. Provider and purpose unknown; not reliably visible in DevTools.

cookies.name: __Secure-1PAPISID
cookies.description: First-party secure cookie used by Google to build a user profile and display relevant, personalized Google Ads. Stores user preferences when viewing pages with Google services such as Maps.

cookies.name: __Secure-1PSID
cookies.description: First-party secure cookie used by Google to authenticate users, store session preferences, and perform security measures. Acts as an identity token restricted to first-party contexts.

cookies.name: __Secure-1PSIDCC
cookies.description: First-party secure 'Cookie Check' token that protects users' data from unauthorized access. Provides anti-CSRF (Cross-Site Request Forgery) and anti-abuse protection for first-party Google contexts.

cookies.name: __Secure-3PAPISID
cookies.description: Third-party secure cookie used by Google for API authentication and to build a user profile for personalized advertising. Used when Google services are embedded on third-party websites.

cookies.name: __Secure-3PSID
cookies.description: Third-party secure cookie used by Google to authenticate users and store session preferences when Google services are embedded on third-party sites.

cookies.name: __Secure-3PSIDCC
cookies.description: Third-party secure 'Cookie Check' token that protects users' data from unauthorized access. Provides anti-CSRF and anti-abuse protection for third-party contexts where Google services are embedded.

cookies.name: APISID
cookies.description: Used by Google to store user preferences and information for Google Maps and other Google services. Helps build a profile of the user's interests to show relevant, personalized ads across Google products.

cookies.name: HSID
cookies.description: Security cookie used by Google to prevent cross-site request forgery (CSRF) and other malicious attacks. Works together with SID to authenticate users and protect their sessions.

cookies.name: SAPISID
cookies.description: Secure version of APISID. Used by Google to build a profile of website visitor interests for personalized advertising across Google products and services.

cookies.name: SID
cookies.description: Core Google security cookie used to authenticate users, prevent fraud, and protect user data as they interact with Google services. Works in tandem with HSID to secure sessions.

cookies.name: SIDCC
cookies.description: Security cookie that acts as a 'Cookie Check' token. Protects users' data from unauthorized access and provides anti-CSRF and anti-abuse protection across Google services.

cookies.name: SSID
cookies.description: Secure session identifier cookie used by Google to store user preferences and authenticate sessions. Collects visitor information for Google security purposes.

cookies.name: __TAG_ASSISTANT
cookies.description: Set when using Google Tag Assistant for debugging Google Tag Manager and gtag.js installations (Google Analytics, Google Ads, etc.). Used to persist debug state or link the debug session. Tag Assistant uses tagassistant.google.com to enable debug mode instead of third-party cookies, ensuring compatibility as third-party cookies are phased out.

cookies.name: cookietest
cookies.description: The cookietest cookie is typically used to determine whether the user's browser accepts cookies, essential for website functionality and user experience.

cookies.name: ISCHECKURLRISK
cookies.description: Used to track or cache whether a URL risk check has been performed. Typically set by security software, browser extensions, or enterprise tools that check links for phishing or malware before navigation.

cookies.name: __itrace_wid
cookies.description: Visitor or widget identifier used by I-TRACING for audience measurement, traffic tracking, and to measure site performance. Part of I-TRACING's analytics and tracking services.

cookies.name: _dd_s
cookies.expiry: 15 minutes idle / 4 hours max (cookie expiry: 1 year with SDK v6+)
cookies.description: Session cookie set by Datadog Real User Monitoring (RUM). Groups all RUM events from a single user session across pages. Contains session ID, sampling exclusion flag, and session expiry. Session extends by 15 minutes on each interaction, up to 4 hours max. As of Browser SDK v6, the cookie expiry is extended to 1 year to support anonymous user tracking (opt out via trackAnonymousUser: false).

cookies.name: show_cta
cookies.description: Used by call-to-action (CTA) or popup tools to remember whether to show or hide a CTA. Enables display rules for controlling CTA visibility across sessions.

cookies.name: perf_{suffix}
cookies.description: Pattern discovered by Osano consent/audit tools. Name: 'perf_' plus variable suffix. Vendor and purpose unresolved.

cookies.name: nlssid*
cookies.description: Pattern discovered by Osano consent/audit tools. Attributed to Microsoft Dynamics for session management.

cookies.name: auth0
cookies.description: Auth0 session cookie. Stores session state for authenticated users when using Auth0 Universal Login or hosted login page. Required for single sign-on and session persistence.

cookies.name: _auth0
cookies.description: Auth0 internal cookie used for state and nonce during login flows. Helps prevent CSRF and replay attacks during authentication.

cookies.name: auth0.is.authenticated
cookies.description: Indicates whether the user is currently authenticated via Auth0. The _legacy_ prefixed variant is a SameSite compatibility fallback for older browsers that do not support SameSite=None.

cookies.name: auth0.organization_hint
cookies.description: Stores which Auth0 organization the user last authenticated with. The _legacy_ prefixed variant is a SameSite compatibility fallback for older browsers that do not support SameSite=None.

cookies.name: __stripe_mid
cookies.description: Stripe fraud prevention cookie. Persists a unique identifier to help detect and prevent fraud across checkout sessions. Set when Stripe.js or Checkout is loaded.

cookies.name: __stripe_sid
cookies.description: Stripe session cookie. Ties the browser session to a specific Stripe Checkout or Payment Element session. Required for completing payments and fraud detection.

cookies.name: YSC
cookies.description: YouTube embed cookie. Tracks views of embedded YouTube videos and is used for analytics and ad attribution when YouTube content is embedded on third-party sites.

cookies.name: VISITOR_INFO1_LIVE
cookies.description: YouTube cookie that tracks visitor preferences and is used for bandwidth estimation and personalized content on embedded YouTube players.

cookies.name: PREF
cookies.description: Stores user preferences for YouTube (and other Google services when embedded), including volume and playback settings. Also used for ad personalization.

cookies.name: VISITOR_PRIVACY_METADATA
cookies.description: Stores the user's privacy and consent settings for embedded YouTube videos.

cookies.name: __Secure-YEC
cookies.description: YouTube cookie used for user identification, storing preferences, detecting bot traffic, and resolving service problems.

cookies.name: __Secure-ROLLOUT_TOKEN
cookies.description: YouTube cookie used for A/B testing and feature rollout experimentation. Controls which new features or interface changes are shown to users during staged rollouts, ensuring a consistent experiment experience per user.

cookies.name: __Secure-YNID
cookies.description: YouTube cookie used for storing video player preferences, aiding secure log-ins, and detecting spam.

cookies.name: vuid
cookies.description: Vimeo analytics cookie that assigns a unique identifier to the visitor. Used by Vimeo to collect usage statistics for embedded video players.

cookies.name: player
cookies.description: Stores Vimeo video player preferences such as volume level and playback quality settings. Ensures a consistent viewing experience across embedded Vimeo players.

cookies.name: ghcc
cookies.description: GitHub cookie that validates and stores the user's cookie consent preferences. Set when a user accepts or rejects non-essential cookies on GitHub pages. Essential for respecting the user's consent choices.

cookies.name: dd_cookie_test_*
cookies.description: Temporary test cookie created by the Datadog Browser SDK during initialization to verify that cookies are enabled in the browser. Should be removed immediately after the check, but may persist in some browsers due to a known SDK issue.

cookies.name: __mp_opt_in_out_*
cookies.description: Stores the user's opt-in or opt-out status for Mixpanel analytics tracking. Set when a user explicitly opts in or out via the Mixpanel SDK (opt_in_tracking / opt_out_tracking). The suffix is the Mixpanel project token. Persists across sessions to respect user consent preferences.

cookies.name: mp_*_mixpanel
cookies.description: Primary Mixpanel tracking cookie. The wildcard portion is the Mixpanel project token. Stores a unique device/user ID and super properties for analytics. Tracks user interactions across sessions to provide product usage insights. Set as a first-party cookie by the Mixpanel JS SDK.

cookies.name: sc_anonymous_id
cookies.description: Stores an anonymous visitor ID to track listeners across sites with embedded SoundCloud players.

cookies.name: sc_tracking_anonymous_id
cookies.description: Secondary anonymous tracking ID used by SoundCloud for cross-site listener analytics.

cookies.name: datadome
cookies.description: Bot detection and fraud prevention cookie. Encrypted, contains no personal data.

cookies.name: cookie_consent
cookies.description: Stores the visitor's cookie consent choice for SoundCloud's own consent management.

cookies.name: sc_theme
cookies.description: Stores the user's UI theme preference for the SoundCloud player.

cookies.name: sc_session
cookies.description: Stores SoundCloud session data for playback and user state.

categories.name: Essential
categories.description: Required for the website to function properly. Cannot be disabled.

categories.name: Analytics
categories.description: Help understand how visitors interact with the website by collecting anonymous information.

categories.name: Marketing
categories.description: Used to track visitors across websites to display relevant advertisements.

categories.name: Personalized
categories.description: Allow the website to remember choices you make and provide enhanced features.

categories.name: Blocklisted
categories.description: Cookies blocked by policy. Standard ad tech is categorized as Marketing; users can choose to enable or disable those.
